channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Sokka gameplay trailer for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game released
item.content:encoded:
Team Avatar is finally complete with the latest character gameplay reveal trailer dropping for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, as Sokka and his trusty boomerang make their appearance. While Sokka does not have any elemental bending abilities, the trailer shows him going toe to toe using his boomerang and staff to deal some major physical damage.

Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game will have a base roster of 12 playable characters including Aang, Katara, Zuko, Sokka, Korra, Zaheer, Ozai, Azula, Toph, and Avatar Kyoshi, while the last two characters are yet to be confirmed. The modes that Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game will launch with include  Story, Arcade, Training, local multiplayer and online multiplayer. The online multiplayer will feature crossplay between platforms and have rollback netcode. If you just want to watch fights there will be a Spectator mode, and for those who want to see artwork from the show’s history, including never before seen stuff, there will be a gallery mode.

There are two editions of Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game that are available. The standard edition will be the base game and that is priced at £24.99/$29.99. The Digital Deluxe Edition will include the base game, the year one pass that will give access to five more characters as they release, a digital artbook, and the digital soundtrack. This version is priced at £41.99/$49.99. If you decide to pre-order Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game the Samurai Appa skin, exclusive colour variants for Aang, Korra, Zuko, Katara, Toph, and Sokka, and a vote for the year one character pass to decide who joins the roster.

Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game will launch on July 2nd for PC, PS5, Xbox Series XS, Switch 2, and Switch.

Source: YouTube



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/03/sokka-gameplay-trailer-for-avatar-legends-the-fighting-game-released/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls adds Hulk and Black Panther to the roster
item.content:encoded:
A new trailer for Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls has dropped, confirming two more characters that are being added to the game with Hulk and Black Panther debuting in the video. They are part of the third team being introduced to the game, called The Fighting Avengers, which is led by Captain America with Iron Man also a member.

The gameplay trailer shows Hulk using his full strength against various opponents and sustaining his anger throughout. He seems to have a bit of speed to him along with his strength which could be great for players that can bring him under control. In terms of Black Panther, it is Shuri not T’Challa under the mask. As you would expect from Black Panther speed and agility are key bases for her attacks. The trailer also confirmed Wakanda as another stage for Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls.

The confirmed roster so far for Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls includes Captain America, Iron Man, Ms Marvel, Dr Doom, Storm, Star Lord, Ghost Rider, Spider-Man, Peni Parker, Magik, Wolverine, Danger, Hulk, and Black Panther. Team names will play a part in Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, with Amazing Guardians being one of them. The game will feature automatic team name generation that will take into account the characters chosen and Marvel lore. All the names will be on the screen and announced by the ring announcer. Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls will launch on 6th August 2026 for PS5 and PC.

Source: YouTube



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/03/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls-adds-hulk-and-black-panther-to-the-roster/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
